subject: Commonly Used Discrete Random Variables
question: Suppose a local bus service accepted 12 reservations for a commuter bus with 10 seats. Seven of the ten reservations went to regular commuters who will show up for sure. The other 5 passengers will show up with a 50% chance, independently of each other. (a) Find the probability that the bus will be overbooked. (b) Find the probability that there will be empty seats.
